Class OutlineTextImage

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
Main.Image.OutlineTextImage
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class OutlineTextImage extends javafx.scene.layout.StackPane
A UI component that renders text with a black outline effect. This class uses two layered Text nodes: one for the stroke (outline) and one for the fill (main text color). The layers are stacked using a StackPane to create an outlined text appearance commonly used for game UI.

    Description
    void
    setColor(javafx.scene.paint.Color c)
    Changes the fill color of the text while keeping the black outline unchanged.

    Applies a drop shadow effect to the stroke layer, enhancing the visibility of the text outline.

    Updates the text content for both the stroke and fill layers.

    Methods inherited from interface javafx.css.Styleable

    getStyleableNode

  • Field Details

    • FONT_CHANGO

      public static final javafx.scene.text.Font FONT_CHANGO
      Custom Chango font loaded from resources.

    • FONT_MALI

      public static final javafx.scene.text.Font FONT_MALI
      Custom Mali font loaded from resources.

  • Constructor Details

    • OutlineTextImage

      public OutlineTextImage(String text, char F, int size)
      Creates outlined text using the specified string, font type, and font size. The constructor selects the font (M for Mali, C for Chango), configures the stroke and fill layers, and adds both layers to the StackPane to produce the outline effect.
      Parameters:
      text - the text content to display
      F - the font type ('M' for Mali, 'C' for Chango)
      size - the font size of the text

  • Method Details

    • setText

      public void setText(String text)
      Updates the text content for both the stroke and fill layers.
      Parameters:
      text - the new text to display

    • setTextAlignment

      public void setTextAlignment(javafx.scene.text.TextAlignment textAlignment)
      Sets the text alignment for both the stroke and fill layers.
      Parameters:
      textAlignment - the alignment to apply to the text

    • setDropShadow

      public void setDropShadow(javafx.scene.effect.DropShadow d)
      Applies a drop shadow effect to the stroke layer, enhancing the visibility of the text outline.
      Parameters:
      d - the DropShadow effect to apply

    • setColor

      public void setColor(javafx.scene.paint.Color c)
      Changes the fill color of the text while keeping the black outline unchanged.
      Parameters:
      c - the new fill color
